name: roblox-creator-automator
description: CLI tools for validating Roblox creator configs and generating Luau product modules.

scripts.validate:example: npm run build && node dist/cli.js validate --config examples/creator.config.example.json --dry-run
scripts.export:example: npm run build && node dist/cli.js validate --config examples/creator.config.example.json --out CreatorProducts.lua

author: lowkeyjojo
